name: start-services
description: Check and start PostgreSQL and Redis in one step, collapsing 3 separate service checks into 1 call.

parameters.name: --check-only
parameters.description: Only check status, do not start services

examples.expected: Starts PostgreSQL and Redis if not running

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces 3 sequential service check/start steps with 1 call, saving 2 agent steps per test setup.
